features: High-Density Foam Sleeves: The Dekton Gloss Set includes high-density foam rollers that deliver a smooth, even application of gloss paints and varnishes. Designed for professional-quality finishes, these foam sleeves ensure minimal texture and an impeccable, streak-free result.

Versatile Compatibility: Ideal for use with both solvent-based and water-based products, these rollers provide versatile application options for a wide range of gloss paints and varnishes. Whether you’re working on home improvement projects or professional tasks, this set adapts to your needs.

Durable Finish and Seamless Repairs on Nicks: Achieve a durable, long-lasting finish with these high-quality foam rollers. The robust construction ensures that the rollers maintain their shape and performance, providing a consistent, high-gloss surface without shedding or leaving behind roller marks.

Complete Set for Convenience: The 4-piece set includes two 4" foam rollers, one paint tray, and one roller frame. This comprehensive set provides everything you need to start your painting project right away, offering convenience and eliminating the need for additional purchases.

User-Friendly Design: The ergonomic roller frame ensures comfortable handling and efficient application, while the included tray makes loading paint and varnish a breeze. Designed with ease of use in mind, this set enhances your painting experience, making it ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
description: Introducing the Dekton 4" Gloss Set 4pc, a comprehensive painting solution designed for achieving a flawless finish on various surfaces. This set includes two high-density foam rollers, one paint tray, and one sturdy roller frame, ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and professional painters. The high-density foam rollers are engineered to deliver a smooth, consistent gloss finish with minimal texture, making them perfect for applying paints, varnishes, and other coatings. Their superior absorption and release capabilities ensure a durable finish while seamlessly repairing nicks and imperfections on your surfaces. The rollers are specifically designed to work with solvent-based products, providing versatile use across a range of applications. The included paint tray features a practical design that holds paint securely, allowing for easy loading and efficient application. The roller frame is constructed for durability and comfort, making it easy to maneuver and control during use. Whether you’re refreshing the look of your home or undertaking a professional project, the Dekton 4" Gloss Set 4pc offers the tools needed for a high-quality, polished result. The seamless application and reliable performance of this set ensure that you can achieve a professional-grade finish every time. Enhance your painting experience with the precision and convenience of Dekton's premium gloss set, designed to deliver excellence in every stroke.
